body.title: Fix savestateauto Step 6 — emit pointer-shape preserve string, not copy-shape
body.result: savestateauto/SKILL.md Step 6 rewritten to pointer-shape: 3-line preserve string citing slate path + session_manager.py show 1 + in-flight + next. Removed copy-shape template that duplicated slate.
body.description:
Current savestateauto/SKILL.md Step 6 template builds a preserve string that DUPLICATES slate contents (today's commits, done tickets, filed tickets, active decisions). Wasteful — slate + session record are already persisted on disk. Per feedback_compact_preserve_is_pointer_not_copy.md, the preserve string should be a POINTER: session id + path to slate + command to read session record + in-flight hypothesis + 1-3 next-priority IDs.

Fix: rewrite Step 6 template to emit pointer shape:
```
preserve: Session <sid>. State on disk — read ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/YYYYMMDD.slate.txt and run session_manager.py show 1 for full context. In-flight: <hypothesis or NONE>. Next: <1-3 ticket ids>.
```

Scope: savestateauto/SKILL.md Step 6 template only. Files: ~/.claude/skills/savestateauto/SKILL.md. Risk: none (skill edit, live behavior change).

test_plan: Run /savestateauto, verify emitted block is short (~4 lines), references slate file path and session_manager.py show 1 as pointers, does not contain commit hashes or ticket-id lists.
